message:
fix: backpressure yellow classification, search test corrections, theme test races

- Add missing duration-over-80 checks (pool, wbq, commit) to Yellow
  classification in backpressure::classify() — thresholds were defined
  but not evaluated
- Fix tracing spans test to consume all search phases (fast + refinement)
  so quality/blend/rerank spans are actually emitted
- Fix vector_index upsert-at-capacity test to match actual code behavior:
  updating an existing entry in-place succeeds; only new entries rejected
- Serialize named-theme tests with NAMED_THEME_TEST_LOCK to prevent
  global ACTIVE_NAMED_THEME_INDEX races between concurrent tests
- Fix ctrl_t/shift_t theme cycle tests to hold both ScopedThemeLock and
  NAMED_THEME_TEST_LOCK with synchronized initial state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
